## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] App changes
- [ ] Package changes
- [ ] Supabase migrations or functions
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD or infrastructure

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Notes

Mention environment variables, migrations, deployment considerations, or follow-up work.
